five_layer_learning.real_commercial_usecase: run2_7_commercial_usecase.json selected one AI design-to-production platform launch deck usecase before generation.
five_layer_learning.multimodal_tutorial_case_database: run2_7_multimodal_source_records.json stores derived text, image-reference, video, audio, transcript, and interaction observations with anti-copy boundaries.
five_layer_learning.design_memory: run2_7_design_memory.json serializes typography, spacing, composition, rhythm, and source-brand sanitization memories.
five_layer_learning.skill_workflow: run2_7_workflow_policy.json maps usecase, source records, design memory ids, visual repair policies, native generation, and QA gates per slide role.
five_layer_learning.code_generated_native_ppt: run2_7_full_skill generated native editable PPT shapes with source-record rails, workflow gates, and a climax proof object.

control_boundary.bad_workflow_memory: valid data plus negative-control replacement memory; good run2_7_design_memory and workflow_policy are forbidden

visual_learning.gemini_summary: Gemini identified superior hierarchy and contrast in run2_7_full_skill, with source-record routing, workflow gates, and an editable proof object visible in the contact sheet.
visual_learning.useful_delta: Run 2.7 makes the data/workflow path more visible than Run 2.6R: design memory becomes presentation code, and source records route into native PPT.
visual_learning.remaining_visual_gap: Contact-sheet-level review still shows small-text legibility limits, possible palette bias, subtle Run 2.5/2.6 differences in the series view, and a need for clearer design-memory schema evidence; native render inspection and human approval are still missing.

next_required_action: Continue the same five layers: thicken multimodal/video tutorial decomposition, make design memory more specific, tighten workflow gates, improve editorial typography and spacing, and rerun four arms.
